nasb.text: Then Israel said to Joseph, “Now let me die, since I have seen your face, that you are still alive.”

esv.text: Israel said to Joseph, “Now let me die, since I have seen your face and know that you are still alive.”

cnv.text: 以色列對約瑟說：“這一次我看見了你的面，知道你還在，我死了也甘心。”

ccb.text: 以色列对约瑟说：“我现在看到你还活着，就是死也安心了。”

csbs.text: 以色列对约瑟说：“既然我看见你的面，知道你还活着，现在我就是死也甘心。”
